title: Distinguish allow/3 from Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow/2
prompt: Write `docs/allow_variants.md` explaining the difference between `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow/3` (takes `repo, owner_pid, allowed_pid`) and `Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox.allow/2` (takes `metadata, adapter`). Must state: (1) the first is the raw PID-based mechanism, (2) the second is the HTTP-header-based variant used for LiveView/channels, (3) they are NOT interchangeable.
tier_rationale: Doc that forces disambiguation of two similarly-named APIs that Claude frequently confuses.
